news.summary: A commercial real estate developer based in Richmond, Delta Citation, has recently acquired the Muddy Creek Self Storage facility in King George, Virginia. Located at 1134 Kings Highway, the facility has been operating for over 30 years, catering to the local King George and Stafford communities, as well as the Hopyard Farms residential area. This off-market acquisition marks a significant milestone for Delta Citation in expanding its portfolio. The facility, covering several acres, is an essential part of the region's landscape.
news.headline: Delta Citation acquires Muddy Creek Self Storage in King George, VA, serving communities for 30+ years.
Fed's Musalem: I expect US economic growth this year materially below estimated 2% trend - Interview.
Fed's Musalem: Inflation expectations remain anchored, it is necessary for the Fed to keep them that way.

news.summary: Hua Zang LLM MaaS and AI hardware have significantly boosted margin expansion, laying the groundwork for sustained earnings growth for Xiao-I Corporation (NASDAQ: AIXI). The company, renowned for its artificial-intelligence solutions, revealed key unaudited results for the period.
news.headline: Xiao-I Corp reaches profitability, projects 19% revenue increase for 2024 and foresees profit in 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 9, 2025, an inventor from Harriman, Tennessee, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the BIRD MESH GUARD. The inventor believed there was a need to address the risk of flocks of birds being pulled into jet engines, potentially endangering operations. The innovative design aims to protect aircraft engines by providing a shield that deflects birds away. This invention offers a solution to prevent such incidents, demonstrating a proactive approach to aviation safety.
news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Tennessee creates Bird Mesh Guard to protect turbine engines from birds to prevent malfunctions.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 9, 2025, Hanna Capital Corp. unveiled plans to secure up to $500,000 through an upcoming non-brokered private placement. The funding will be raised by issuing secured convertible debenture units and/or units.
news.headline: Hanna Capital Corp. plans to raise $500,000 through private placement of convertible debentures and/or units.

Their survey shows that 24% of participants...
news.headline: Survey by Squaremouth shows 24% prioritize health and wellness travel amid economic concerns, revealing a growing trend.

news.summary: In Miami on April 9, 2025, Nsight Health, a prominent company specializing in Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) and Chronic Care Management (CCM) services, announced a partnership with UnisLink, a major provider of technology-driven revenue cycle management (RCM), coding, and credentialing services. This collaboration aims to enhance healthcare services by combining Nsight Health's expertise in RPM and CCM with UnisLink's strong RCM capabilities. Together, the companies will leverage their resources to improve patient care and streamline revenue processes for healthcare providers.
news.headline: Nsight Health partners with UnisLink for healthcare innovation in RPM, CCM, RCM, coding, and credentialing services.

news.summary: In Newport Beach, California on April 9, 2025, GivBux, Inc. (OTC: GBUX), a publicly traded Super App and charitable giving platform, reported the signing of a Letter of Intent. This agreement outlines the acquisition of Charter House, LLC, which specializes in gold-based financial services, and transactions The deal involves obtaining 100% of Charter House's outstanding membership interests.
news.headline: GivBux to acquire Charter House, launch $50M gold-backed expansion acquiring 100% of outstanding membership interests.

news.summary: Celebrate the enhanced Bremer Jewelry store in Peoria with a ribbon-cutting event on April 25th at 10 AM. Established in 1953, Bremer Jewelry has been a beloved institution in Central Illinois. Following extensive renovations, the Peoria location will now offer an even more spacious and updated shopping experience. Join us for the grand re-opening to experience a bigger and brighter Bremer Jewelry store in Peoria.
news.headline: Bremer Jewelry in Peoria reopens with a bigger store after remodeling. Re-opening on April 25th at 10 AM.

news.summary: Sergej Kunz, co-founder of 1inch, emphasizes the importance of creating secure and compliant decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms to attract institutional investors. Institutional DeFi adoption has grown from 10% to 47% of hedge funds in four years and is projected to reach 65% by 2025. Goldman Sachs and Visa are already exploring DeFi opportunities. However, DeFi faces security challenges, with the recent Bybit hack resulting in a $1.4 billion loss. The article suggests the need for stronger security measures and user-friendly interfaces to mitigate risks and enhance institutional trust. Integrating compliance frameworks, blockchain analytics tools, and intent-based architecture could make DeFi safer for institutional engagement. Late adopters of DeFi may face regulatory hurdles, while early adopters like JPMorgan and Citi are ahead in embracing onchain finance. The article calls for clear regulatory guidelines, standardized protocols, and collaborative efforts to facilitate broader institutional participation in DeFi.
news.headline: DeFi must enhance security to attract institutions: Institutional DeFi adoption grew from 10% to 47% in 4 years, projected 65% by 2025. Circumstances like recent $1.4 billion Bybit hack show need for improvements in platform security, user experience. Institutional players hesitate due to security risks, noncompliance, and lack of clarity in regulatory framework. Implementing intention-based architecture and user-friendly interfaces can mitigate risks and improve trust. Early adopters have a competitive edge, while late adopters may face regulatory challenges by 2026. Regulators must provide clear guidelines for broader institutional participation.

news.summary: In response to President Trump's latest tariffs, Beijing has revealed a fresh round of tariffs amounting to 50%. This move comes amid an escalating trade conflict between the two superpowers, further intensifying the tensions.
news.headline: China increases tariffs on U.S. goods to 84% after Trump's new levies, in retaliation to 50% tariffs imposed by the US.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, at Google Cloud Next 2025, DDN, a prominent provider of AI and data intelligence solutions, revealed a collaboration with Google Cloud to revolutionize AI infrastructure. This collaboration involves the utilization of Google Cloud Managed Lustre by DDN's EXAScaler. The solution is now available for Google Cloud users, offering a persistent parallel file system that enhances performance, scalability, and efficiency for businesses and startups engaged in creating AI, GenAI, and HPC applications.
news.headline: DDN collaborates with Google Cloud for AI initiatives with Managed Lustre and Infinia at Google Cloud Next 2025.

news.summary: Elavon, the merchant services payment provider of U.S. Bank, has recently risen two positions in the 2025 Nilson Report, now standing as the fifth-largest U.S. merchant acquirer and the second-largest bank-owned acquirer based on Mastercard and Visa purchase volume rankings. The Nilson Report, a renowned source for insights into the global card and mobile payment industry, revealed these rankings in early April. According to the Nilson Report (Issue 1282, March 2025), Elavon currently holds the fifth position.
news.headline: Elavon, part of U.S. Bank, rises to 5th largest U.S. merchant acquirer in 2025 Nilson Report, 2nd largest bank-owned.

news.summary: UiPath has revealed its latest AI innovation, the UiPath Medical Record Summarization agent, in collaboration with Google Cloud Vertex AI and Gemini models. This cutting-edge technology utilizes generative AI to streamline medical record processing efficiently.
news.headline: UiPath & Google Cloud partner on AI for medical record summarization, using Vertex AI & Gemini models.

news.summary: Yubico, a hardware authentication security keys provider, has been recognized with prestigious awards in the cybersecurity and technology sectors. The company, listed as YUBICO on NASDAQ STOCKHOLM, was honored with the title of 'Best Security Company of the Year' at the Cyber Security Awards. Additionally, their YubiKey Bio Series - Multi-protocol Edition was awarded the 'Cybersecurity New Product Launch of the Year' at the teissAwards 2025. Yubico has solidified its position as a leader in the industry with these esteemed accolades.
news.headline: Yubico wins awards in cybersecurity industry: ‘Best Security Company of the Year’ and New Product Launch of the Year.

news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has introduced the Next-Generation Embedded Security Testbench. This innovative test solution is tailored to meet the rising complexities in security testing for contemporary chips and embedded devices. With improved flexibility and reduced setup challenges, it enhances the reliability and consistency of crucial security assessments. The launch aims to cater to the growing demand for robust security evaluations in today's interconnected world of devices.
news.headline: Keysight Technologies launches Next-Gen Embedded Security Testbench for modern chips, aimed at tackling complex security testing demands, offering flexibility and reliability. #TechNews #KEYS

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Lamons®, a renowned global provider of safety sealing and attachment solutions, unveiled the Extreme Temperature Gasket (XTG), known for its exceptional durability, safety features, and resistance to high temperatures. This innovative product is designed to withstand extreme conditions and cater to diverse industrial needs. The XTG aims to provide superior performance and reliability, catering to industries where temperature resilience is crucial.
news.headline: Lamons introduces new Extreme Temperature Gasket (XTG) for safety and high-temp resistance. HOUSTON, April 9, 2025.

news.summary: In San Francisco on April 9, 2025, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP announced they are investigating potential legal claims on behalf of investors of Origin Materials, Inc. regarding alleged false statements connected to a manufacturing plant being developed by Origin. The plant was initially set to be completed by a certain date, but there are concerns about misleading information provided to investors. The law firm is looking into this matter to assess any legal actions that may be pursued on behalf of the investors involved.
news.headline: Investor alert: Origin Materials, Inc. (NASDAQCM: ORGN) under investigation for false statements on manufacturing plant.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Centri Business Consulting, LLC, a leading advisory firm, revealed its sponsors for the upcoming Centri Capital Conference to be held on April 22 at Nasdaq in New York City. Known as one of the fastest-growing and highly regarded firms in the industry, Centri Business Consulting is organizing this event expected to gather significant attention.
news.headline: Centri Business Consulting, LLC announces sponsors for Capital Conference at Nasdaq on April 22 in NYC.

news.summary: In a press release from Hartford, Wisconsin on April 9, 2025, Pro Smoker unveiled their latest innovation in smokehouse technology. The leading company introduced the new 150S and 300S handload smokers, which offer unparalleled flavor and precision for food professionals. These smokers are designed to combine smoking, roasting, and cooking capabilities, catering to the diverse needs of the industry. Pro Smoker's new series aims to revolutionize the way food is prepared, elevating the standards for quality and efficiency in food processing.
news.headline: Pro Smoker introduces 150S and 300S handload smokers for ultimate flavor and precision, revolutionizing industry.

news.summary: A renowned figure in the world of motorsports is set to showcase candid interviews in a new audio and video series by RACER. The leading motorsports media brand in North America, RACER, has revealed the debut of "Racers Unchained with Paul," their newest original podcast series on April 9, 2025. This series promises unfiltered conversations and insights with no barriers, marking an exciting venture for fans of the sport.
news.headline: RACER Podcasts debuts "Racers Unchained with Paul Tracy" featuring bold interviews. IRVINE, Calif., April 9, 2025 /PRNewswire.

news.summary: Atlanta's esteemed double board-certified plastic and reconstructive surgeon, Dr. Mark Mitchell Jones, will be retiring as his office shuts its doors on May 30, 2025. Patients have until May 15 to obtain their medical records. Dr. Jones expresses gratitude to all who have been part of his journey.
news.headline: Renowned Atlanta plastic surgeon Dr. Mark Mitchell Jones announces retirement after decades of excellence in surgery. Office closure: May 30, 2025.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in New York, viaim, a company that focuses on AI hardware for smart office solutions, is gearing up for the upcoming launch of its NoteKit AI voice recorder in North America. The recorder gained attention at CES 2025 held in January. The device is equipped with AI technology for live transcription.
news.headline: viaim's NoteKit AI voice recorder set to revolutionize North American classrooms, impressing at CES 2025.

news.summary: A recently released blueprint by Info-Tech Research Group provides retailers with a detailed roadmap to address challenges stemming from evolving consumer behavior. This resource empowers IT leaders with valuable insights and effective tactics to incorporate AI-driven smart pricing strategies.
news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group's blueprint provides retailers with strategies for AI-enabled smart pricing, helping navigate consumer behavior changes.

news.summary: A new branch of LA CENTA has been inaugurated in Lynwood, CA, marking their 13th office and second in Los Angeles. The Los Angeles Center for Ear, Nose, Throat, and Allergy is expanding its reach to provide specialized care to more communities. The new location aims to deliver expert medical services to a larger audience, reflecting the organization's commitment to improving access to healthcare. This expansion highlights the growing demand for their services and reinforces their position as a leading provider in the region.
news.headline: Los Angeles Center for Ear, Nose, Throat, and Allergy (LA CENTA) opens 13th office in Lynwood, CA.

news.summary: A company has recently hired Alex Gordon, a certified financial planner, as a Wealth Advisor. Alex's role will involve developing personalized wealth plans for affluent individuals and families. This hiring highlights the firm's dedication to offering tailored services across generations and supports its continuous expansion efforts.
news.headline: Mesirow Wealth Management hires Wealth Advisor Alex Gordon, reinforcing commitment to multi-gen client service.

news.summary: Presented in a clip-mount TO-247 package suitable for direct mounting on a heatsink, this device boasts a high pulse absorption capacity up to 75 J in just 0.1 second. Additionally, it offers a power dissipation capability of 150 W.
news.headline: Vishay Intertechnology's AEC-Q200 qualified power resistor in TO-247 package absorbs up to 75J/0.1s & handles 150W power.

news.summary: EveryDay Labs, a provider of attendance improvement solutions based in Redwood City, California, has announced the opening of nominations for their inaugural awards ceremony. The event aims to recognize school districts and educators who are dedicated to ensuring all students have the opportunity to learn. Nominations are being accepted for the first time in 2025, and the company invites submissions to honor those working tirelessly in this field. The ceremony will mark the efforts put into improving attendance in schools, with winners receiving recognition for their hard work.
news.headline: EveryDay Labs announces inaugural Attendance Innovation Awards, celebrating educators' efforts in ensuring student attendance. Nominations open.

news.summary: A private equity firm based in New Orleans, LongueVue Capital (LVC), has partnered with a top control panel and automation provider in the data center and industrial sector. The investment was made in Daedalus Industrial, with the announcement made on April 9, 2025. This collaboration marks a significant move by LVC into this sector, showcasing their commitment to growth and innovation in the industry.
news.headline: Private equity firm LVC invests in Daedalus Industrial, a control panel and automation provider in data center and industrial sectors.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Gnosis, previously Mountain View Medical Laboratory, situated in Hemet, California, revealed its flagship location's Grand Re-Opening. This event signals a significant milestone for the diagnostic facility.
news.headline: Gnosis Lab in Hemet, CA reopens as flagship location on April 10, 2025 after rebranding, exciting for community.

news.summary: A new innovation called THE RAD BLOWER has been introduced by an inventor from Decatur, Tennessee on April 9, 2025. The invention aims to provide a more effective method for removing dirt, dust, and debris from vehicle radiators. The inventor expressed a desire to improve maintenance for farm tractors, heavy equipment, and other vehicles with this design. The RAD BLOWER offers a solution to enhance cleaning processes for radiators and is expected to make an impact in the automotive industry.
news.headline: Inventor from Decatur, Tenn. introduces THE RAD BLOWER for cleaning tractor radiators. KXK-172.

news.summary: In Rexburg, Idaho on April 9, 2025, Activated Insights®, a prominent company specializing in employee engagement, retention, recruiting, reputation management, and continuing education for senior care providers, has successfully completed the acquisition of WeCare Connect™. WeCare Connect™ is recognized as a leading provider of technology-enabled communication services in the senior care industry. The acquisition marks a significant development in the sector.
news.headline: Activated Insights® acquires WeCare Connect™ to boost its impact in senior care market, enhancing services in employee engagement, retention, and reputation management.
Delta Air CEO: We will defer any aircraft deliveries that have tariffs on it. $DAL

news.summary: The FDA recently granted approval to Bristol Myers Squibb for the use of Opdivo in conjunction with Yervoy as a primary treatment for adults and pediatric patients aged 12 and above with unresectable or metastatic microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) or mismatch repair deficient (dMMR) colorectal cancer (CRC). This decision was made in advance of the June 23, 2025, Prescription Drug User Fee Act goal date. The approval was based on data from the CheckMate-8HW trial, the largest Phase 3 trial involving 839 participants with MSI-H/dMMR mCRC. The trial compared Opdivo combined with Yervoy to Opdivo alone in all treatment lines, as well as Opdivo plus Yervoy to investigator's choice chemotherapy in the first-line treatment setting.
news.headline: FDA approves Bristol Myers' Opdivo plus Yervoy combo for untreated colorectal cancer patients, based on CheckMate-8HW trial with 839 participants.

news.summary: As the possibility of a TikTok ban continues to grow, the app remains extremely popular among young users. Despite the threat of prohibition, TikTok has solidified its position as the top social media platform for teenagers. The app has seen a significant increase in users, with numbers reaching record highs. The uncertainty surrounding its future has not deterred its appeal, highlighting the strong connection between TikTok and its youthful audience.
news.headline: Despite the threat of a ban, TikTok remains the top choice for teens, solidifying its lead as a favorite social media app.

news.summary: During its yearly cloud computing event, Google introduced a cutting-edge seventh-generation processor chip created in-house, along with a range of new artificial intelligence products. The latest developments include the Ironwood Processor and AI Gemini Models, highlighting Google's commitment to innovation in cloud technology. This announcement was made on a global stage, emphasizing the company's efforts to enhance its network capabilities worldwide.
news.headline: Google announces 7th-gen Ironwood processor chip and AI Gemini models at cloud event, highlighting advancements in AI tech and global network.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on April 9, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, has announced its full support for the SuiHub-AUS program in organizing Blockathon 2025. This nationwide hackathon aims to empower students and will focus on the theme "AI for Decentralized Autonomy." The event will bring together a wide audience to collaborate and showcase their skills in utilizing artificial intelligence for decentralized autonomy.
news.headline: Bybit backs UAE students in 2025 Blockathon for AI autonomy with SuiHub-AUS program; world's 2nd largest crypto exchange participates.
